title: DRINKING FOUNTAINS - 211info
text: TIGARD PUBLIC WORKS DRINKING FOUNTAINS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a hydration station to those seeking relief from extreme heat. 8777 SW Burnham Street Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Unrestricted. Pets are allowed. ADA accessible. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week Get Directions Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Trimet lines: 76, 78, 12, 45 Services: Disaster Related Drinking Water If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
